summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of offline-first attendance management app. All requested features tested and working correctly: connection status indicator, sync button, guest addition, attendance modification, taxa modification, înlocuitor logic, and date picker. PDF export button present and functional.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads members and guests from server when online
Connection status indicator (Online/Offline) displayed correctly with green/amber background
Sync button visible and functional - shows 'Sincronizează' text
Sync button shows pending changes count (e.g., '1 nesincronizate')
Add guest form works - saves locally and syncs to server
Attendance modification (prezent checkbox) works - saves locally and syncs
Green highlighting (bg-green-100) applied when member is prezent
Taxa modification works - updates total correctly
Înlocuitor logic works - checkbox enabled only when guest has 'invitat de' set
Yellow highlighting (bg-yellow-100) applied to member when they have an înlocuitor
Blue highlighting (bg-blue-50) applied to guest marked as înlocuitor
Înlocuitor name displayed in member's ÎNLOCUITOR column
Member's prezent checkbox disabled when they have an înlocuitor
Date picker opens and displays Romanian calendar
Date selection loads data for selected date
Export PDF button present and functional
seed_data_creation: Created 2 guests for testing: 'Ion Testescu' (Test SRL) and 'Test Invitat' (Test Company, invited by Adam Maksay)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All offline-first features working correctly. DatabaseService uses localStorage on web platform. SyncService handles online/offline detection and auto-sync. DashboardPage refactored to use useOffline hook. Green highlighting for prezent, yellow for înlocuitor on member, blue for înlocuitor guest. Sync indicator shows pending changes count.

features_verified.connection_status_indicator: Working - shows 'Online' with green background or 'Offline' with amber background
features_verified.sync_button: Working - shows 'Sincronizează', displays pending changes count, triggers manual sync
features_verified.add_guest: Working - form saves locally first, then syncs to server when online
features_verified.modify_attendance: Working - checkbox toggles prezent status, saves locally and syncs
features_verified.modify_taxa: Working - input updates taxa, recalculates totals, saves and syncs
features_verified.inlocuitor_logic: Working - checkbox enabled only with invitat_de, updates member row with înlocuitor name
features_verified.green_highlighting: Working - bg-green-100 applied to member row when prezent=true
features_verified.yellow_highlighting: Working - bg-yellow-100 applied to member row when has înlocuitor
features_verified.blue_highlighting: Working - bg-blue-50 applied to guest row when is_inlocuitor=true
features_verified.date_picker: Working - Romanian calendar, date selection loads correct data

offline_first_architecture.DatabaseService: Uses localStorage on web, SQLite on native platforms
offline_first_architecture.SyncService: Handles online/offline events, auto-sync every 5 minutes, manual sync
offline_first_architecture.OfflineContext: Provides isInitialized, isOnline, syncStatus, sync(), db object to components
offline_first_architecture.Data_flow: UI update -> local save -> server sync (when online)
